title: Neobotrydium incisum
intro: There is no information available on the plant Neobotrydium incisum.
taxonomy: Neobotrydium incisum is a genus of fungi in the family Pyronemataceae. The classification of Neobotrydium incisum includes the kingdom Fungi, phylum Ascomycota, and division Ascomycetes. Further classification includes the class Pezizomycetes and order Pezizales. Within the family Pyronemataceae, it belongs to the subfamily Pyronematoideae. Neobotrydium incisum is a type of cup fungus.
side_effects: I couldn't find any information on Neobotrydium incisum.
